name: apsal-studio
description: Create live-action AI photography with scene-aware DNA recommendations, reusable personal memory, shareable Extension Packs, bound references, and native-4K runs.

interface.shortDescription: 按场景推荐 DNA，积累个人方法，生成九张真人摄影作品
interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio interprets one natural-language idea, explains and recommends Character, World, Scene, and Photo DNA, remembers creator-confirmed assets locally, installs or exports rights-aware DNA Extension Packs, binds actual references, and runs nine independent 9:16 native-4K Jobs.
defaultPrompt: 创建九张真人摄影主题，并解释为什么推荐每个 DNA。
把刚确认的新 DNA 打好标签并保存到我的 DNA。
把权利清晰的 DNA 单独导出为可分享的 GitHub Extension Pack。
